summary:
TRADE WARS AND SUPPLY CHAIN WARNINGS: Brandon addresses concerns regarding tariffs and escalating trade wars with China. Brandon recalls seeing visions where stores like Target, Walmart, Costco, and Sam's Club experienced severe supply chain disruptions, forcing them to consolidate merchandise. Brandon specifically mentions the threat of China cutting off medical supplies and anesthesia. Brandon emphasizes that Brandon's role is that of a watchman who shares these visions so people can pray for de-escalation and fair trade agreements between America and China, rather than acting out of fear.

PRACTICAL PREPAREDNESS AND DIVINE PROVISION: Brandon discusses physical preparations for potential crises, stating that he does not hoard food or buy massive amounts of groceries out of panic. Brandon advises individuals to rely on divine guidance for their specific geographical situations, noting that city dwellers might need extra supplies while rural residents have access to local farmers. Brandon highlights alternative solutions like utilizing Tower Gardens for year-round vegetables and relying on natural water sources using purification tools like LifeStraws. Brandon recounts stories of divine multiplication, comparing financial survival using eBay and Poshmark to the biblical multiplication of fishes and loaves, and asserts that trusting God brings supernatural provision.

GLOBAL GEOPOLITICS AND THE WINDOW OF GRACE: Brandon discusses a four-year window of grace leading up to the end times, meant to allow unreached populations in North Korea, China, and Vietnam to hear the gospel. Brandon recalls a vision of a bomb detonating on the border and addresses Kim Jong-un's alliance with China and Russia, their attempts to influence South Korea, and plans regarding Taiwan. Brandon states the belief that Kim Jong-un and his sister will eventually be exposed and removed. Brandon also mentions keeping an eye on Israel and Iran in the days ahead, tying these global geopolitical events to a spiritual timeline.

FINANCIAL SHIFTS AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon links an April eclipse to a six-month window involving a major shift in finances and the humbling of America's economy. Brandon predicts a wealth transfer laid up for the righteous and prays for the restoration of retirement accounts, 401ks, crypto investments, and specific stocks like Tesla. Brandon asserts that divine intervention will rebuke the devourer and return stolen wealth sevenfold, encouraging listeners to call for a turnaround in the stock and housing markets. Brandon emphasizes the importance of waiting for divine instruction before making financial moves.

VISIONS OF HEAVEN AND THE NEW EARTH: Brandon describes a vivid spiritual vision of a new earth and paradise. Brandon details seeing people suddenly translated into a pristine environment, wearing thick, colorful robes in shades of red, blue, and purple. Brandon observes that everyone possessed perfect, youthful physical bodies with no ailments. Brandon details the landscape, including exceptionally thick green grass, massive oak trees, unpolluted water, and a sky filled with beautiful birds and swirling pink and purple clouds resembling a hurricane's eye. Brandon notes that this paradise descended from the sky and describes the profound peace of the environment.

POLITICAL ELECTIONS AND JUDICIAL DECISIONS: Brandon discusses upcoming political elections, specifically calling for a landslide victory in Canada and expressing hope for positive electoral outcomes globally. Brandon addresses the United States judicial system, pointing out a recent ruling involving Amy Coney Barrett and other judges. Brandon states that these decisions allow negative elements like MS-13 gang members to cause harm, and Brandon issues a call to pray for judges to make righteous rulings to maintain societal peace and order.
rawData: [April 09, 2025]-[Should you store back food]-[https://youtu.be/oyGi_fSzDDk]-[Hey, good morning family. Thank you for joining me today. Well, there is a lot going on, isn't there? The whole Trump tariff thing is really shaking some things up, stirring some things up, and people ask, "Brandon," through emails and through wherever they are. It's been amazing. People are freaked out and asking, "Should we store food? Should we buy water? Should we buy guns? Should we do this?" Listen, you should not do anything by watching a video. What you should do is pray and ask the Holy Spirit what you should do for your finances and for your life. I told you all I hear in part and I see in part. When the things that I see start coming up in the news, I bring the old videos out because I have so many trolls saying that I'm making stuff up, and so I'm just showing, "Hey, I do see stuff and the Lord's showing me these things." And they say, "Are you a prophet?" I say, "No, I'm not a prophet. I'm a watchman." I've told you all this. I'm called to pray. And I believe the Lord shows me as a watchman on the wall, looking out on a horizon seeing what's coming towards the camp. "Hey, this is what I see coming." And so far there's a lot of accuracy. Have a lot of the things I've seen not come to pass? Yes, there's a lot of things that I've seen that have not come to pass yet. But the things that I've told you so far—some of those things you've seen in the news. So they go, "Well, what's this mean now?" Honestly, I pray none of this that I've seen comes to pass. And you can point fingers at me, call me false all day long, and say he's making stuff up or whatever, but I'm here to tell you, we have to pray for what I've seen about China and the trade wars because it's about medical. They get so irritated and so frustrated with the escalation of this that they start saying, "We're not giving you medicines and things like that." That's what I saw. Now, is that for you to get scared about? No. It could not happen. If we pray and we ask the Father to intervene in this and pray for these trade wars to deescalate and fall apart and that they come to an agreement, then it's all over. Wouldn't it be? I mean, the ultimate goal is not for this to keep going and going and getting out of control and then we go, "Oh, no." Everything I told you—I saw stores that were not able to get merchandise back and forth throughout all the Targets and all the Walmarts and all the Costcos and the Sam's Clubs, and that they had to take everything out of one store and put it in another store because they had to shut that store down because they couldn't get the supplies. The things I see, if you look at it in the natural, it will scare you. It will really freak you out. But if you keep your eyes on Him, if you keep your eyes vertical and you keep looking at the Father and praying over this stuff, knowing that we have authority, it shouldn't freak you out. Now, I have a lot of people all freaked out, and my job right now is I'm diffusing it to say, "Listen, the sky's not falling." Yes, I saw this. Yes, what I saw about the trade wars and the things coming. We should pray. That's what we're here to do. So, can we change it through prayer? I believe so. All things are possible to him who believes. I believe that every believer has the authority of the believer inside of him. We have the power and authority that Jesus has given us. That as He is, so are we in this world. And if Jesus can cause peace to the storms, we can call peace to the storms. We are made in the image of God and we are joint heirs of Jesus Christ. And I believe that we can do those things. Some people don't believe it, but I believe we do. So if you want to watch me, fine. If you don't want to agree with it, that's on you. I know I have all kinds of different beliefs, but I want to tell you this. People ask, "Brandon, what are you doing right now? Are you storing up food? Are you doing all this?" No, I'm not. I am not getting in fear and going out to the grocery store and buying $10,000 worth of groceries and going, "Well, I've got it all in the garage, and I've got it out here and it's going to get hot in the summer and then next thing I know it's spoiled." I'm not doing that. The Holy Spirit didn't tell me, "Brandon, you should go out and buy a freezer full of meat at Sam's tomorrow." He may tell you to do that; He may not. But you have to just follow Him for your household. He may say to you, "Go get water. Go get this. Go get that." I don't know where you live. I don't know if you live in a major apartment complex with 500 people around you—I have no idea, folks. If I lived in Orlando or if I lived in Tampa or a major city that I saw all those people and it's so packed full of people, I might have four or five days' worth of extra food. I live in a little bitty town with not a lot of people and a lot around us is farmers—a lot of farmers and a lot of people growing tomato plants and squash in the summer. I can go down to the local farmers market and stock up every single week and get fresh vegetables around here with apples—not oranges, but apples—and peaches and pears in the fall and toward the late summer. There's all kinds of stuff around here. So, am I freaked out about food? No. There's tons of food around here; we have farmers everywhere. Now, if I lived in Chicago, it might be a different story. I don't know. But I have to tell you, am I afraid? People said, "Should I pull my money out of my bank?" I don't know what you should do. All I saw was the things I see and I relay it and I tell you what I see. Is that for you? That's for you to pray about. I do not want this stuff I see to come to pass. It's like people go, "Well, good for you, Brandon. It came to pass." No, that means it's a prayer fail. In my opinion, if I see something that's drastic and I come on here and tell you about it and it happens, we failed. Now, I know some of the things we can stop and some of the things we can't. I know we are in the last of the last days and I told you we're going to see major things coming, but some of the things I believe we can stop. And so that's my main job: to always pray and ask the Father to change it, just like Abraham. He came and He told Abraham what He was going to do and they had a conversation about it. And if you are a friend of God and you are joint heirs with Him and He comes and talks to you, He'll tell you what He's going to do before He does it. Just because we're friends—you tell your wife everything, don't you? Usually, if you have a good marriage, or your wife tells her husband everything, right? So, the Father, it's like a marriage; we talk and we're friends. And so, that's the way I look at it every day. I just go, "Hey, Lord, what's going on today?" Just like I did with New Orleans and the shooting or Trump's ear, the economy crashing afterwards. We're seeing those things. It's happening. Do I believe we have a window still? People ask, "Brandon, you said we had a window. You said we had a window of four years. Where'd that four years go, buddy?" This is what I want to say back to you: it's a four-year window of grace. I believe at the end of that four-year window—I don't know, because I'm not going to assume, add to, or take away from anything that He's saying—but a four-year window to me is a four-year window before He comes. That's what I have in my heart: that He's getting ready to come that quickly. He said it's one last call, and He's leaving the ninety-nine to go after the one. He's looking for the sinner in the way-back fields. That's what He's after right now. How long does it take to get all those in? I have no idea. People are like, 'We need to get out of here right now.' Listen, North Korea has not been evangelized yet. Has North Korea been radically taught the word of God? My son told me there's 40-some million people in North Korea that have never heard—a lot of them have never heard the gospel. Is that fair? No, that's not fair. There's a lot of people in China that are still so bound because they're underneath the Iron Curtain that they have not heard yet, and Vietnam and all these other places. There's a lot of people that have not had the opportunity to hear the gospel. I know that the Lord is the Lord of the harvest, and His heart is for the souls. His heart is the harvest. Regardless of what everybody wants—to go, 'Well, I'm tired. I'm ready to get out of here'—listen, I want to occupy until He comes. So, the four-year window to me is an extension of grace. Will we still see birthing pains? Yes. I'm believing—and I told you all I believe when I've prayed and I've heard the Lord—that we will have a wealth transfer laid up for the righteous. If you're listening, not everybody's going to participate in this. Oh, I don't know. I pray I do. Honest to goodness, you all. Am I qualified for it? I don't know. I pray and I ask Him, 'Father, make me right before You that I would be able to be used by You. That if You want to give me an idea to get wealth, then Father, to help bring forth the gospel, to do something for Your kingdom, to support people, to help them, then Father, search me and know me.' If I'm not qualified and I mess up, Father, then if it's going to cost me my salvation, if this is going to cost me my marriage, if this is going to cost me my children and we can't handle it, then by all means, Lord, remove that from me because I would rather have nothing than lose my soul to money, to mammon. But if He can trust me and He can look at me and say, 'Brandon, okay.' And He said, 'You may not be able to handle a billion dollars, son, or a million dollars. I'll give you this.' I don't know. All I know is I seek Him. And as I seek Him, I will find Him. The Bible says that, and all the other stuff will be added unto me as I seek Him. And if He sees that I can handle it, fine. And if He says, 'Brandon, I need you to plant a big garden this summer in the next couple of days'—I mean, He may tell me. I don't know. I'll go out there and say, 'Braden, let's go outside and get the ground till up.' I mean, that's what we'll do. I just obey Him. And He may say, 'Brandon, you need to have some cash on hand. You may need to have some ones on hand or some fives or some tens or twenties.' I don't know. Whatever He tells you to do, do it. I was thinking about when Mary pulled on Jesus and she was putting a mandate on that anointing on His life before it was time. And she went to Him and she said, 'Jesus, will you help the bride and bridegroom make the wine? Can you help him?' Basically, so He said, 'It's not My time yet.' But her putting a mandate on that anointing that was on His life, knowing who He was, brought it forth and He started walking in it. It's putting a demand on the anointing that brings forth the giftings. Look what happened to that feast: Jesus showed up and He showed off. And I believe as we put a demand on it: 'Father, You are our provider. You're Jehovah Jireh.' I believe that You take care of the lilies of the field and the birds of the air. How much more will You take care of me as you put a demand on it? If He took care of water and turned it into wine, how much more will He? We don't need a drink; maybe all I need is some groceries. If Mary could put a mandate on the anointing and pull, and know and believe and stretch out her voice to Him as a mother and say, 'I know You can. Will You? Thank you for doing this'—and He's like, 'Out of compassion.' If He had compassion for them, how much more will He have compassion for you? Will you just trust Him and say, 'I believe You're going to take care of me in these end times regardless of what I see on the stock market'? Regardless of what I see with tariffs, if the Lord tells you to do—remember what Mary turned to the servants and said, 'Whatever He tells you to do, do it.' It was an act of obedience immediately to go and bring forth as she was pulling on it and putting a mandate on it and saying, 'Help us.' Then it was obedience to what He instructed to bring it to pass of what they were believing for. And here the wine came and God showed up and showed off. But it was obedience. So as we put a mandate on it: 'Father, You're going to take care of us.' I believe it. You've got my life. I'm not going to stress out and worry about any of this. But if He speaks to you and He says, 'All right, I know I'm going to take care of you, but I want you to go down and put the water in the jugs,' and you say, 'Well, I thought You were just going to show up and show off and do it'—well, just do it. Whatever He says to do, do it. Even if it's a can—if He says, 'Billy Joe, I want you to go down to the Walmart store and buy five cans of green beans,' okay, go do it. And then all of a sudden, you go in your cupboard and you put those green beans inside there—those five cans—and you open it up the next day and there's thirty cans. He's the God of multiplication. He will be the God of the fishes and the loaves to you. Well, I only have enough for five cans. It doesn't matter. He had enough to turn the fishes and the loaves and multiply and feed thousands. How much more can He do it for you? I refuse to get in fear over all the end-time stuff. I refuse to let the circumstances of staying horizontal, looking at things going, 'Man, what are we going to do?' and say, 'No, I take the care out of my prayer and I put my eyes on Jesus regardless of how much I have in my cupboard or my pantry or whatever I've got in my bank account.' If I've got $500 in there and I go, 'Man, all I've got is $500,' God is a God of multiplication. I told you the stories that I have that God takes a little bit of nothing and turns it into the fishes and the loaves and we're able to pay our bills for the whole month with eBay and Poshmark. We'll get down and we'll go, 'Well, what are we going to do?' Trust God. Trust God. And that's what we've done over and over and over and He always comes through. I look back at my kids' videos even tonight of what we were like ten years ago when Braden was little, and I wasted so much time worrying and fretting about how I was going to make the electric, how I was going to pay the water bill, how I was going to pay the gas, how I was going to make my car payment. I worried so much as a father that it ate me up and drove me always to be in that state of care and that state of worry every single day that it robbed me of their childhood because I wasn't able just to sit back and relax because I was always thinking, 'How am I going to take care of all these kids? How am I going to take care of this wife? I don't have an education. I don't have all this. What are You going to do for me, Lord?' Oh God, how are you going to take care of me? That was the way it was. When Megan was diagnosed and through all the things we’ve had going on, I said, 'Lord, how are you going to do this?' But God has always provided. It may not have been as much as I thought I should have, but he always took care of us. Even if it wasn't what I really wanted or I didn't get to wear what I wanted, he always took care of me. It was just a simple act of trusting. I remember the days when I told you I was excited to find shoes at Payless for the kids. You just have to be thankful and walk in the thanksgiving for what he has provided. As you walk in thanksgiving and give him glory for everything he has done, he shows up and shows off with more. I believe that's where we are. People ask, 'Where are you at, Brandon?' That’s where I’m at. I trust God, I stay vertical, and whatever he says to do, do it. Just like Mary said, 'Whatever he says to do, do it.' In closing, people said, 'I thought you saw Kim Jong-un removed. I thought you said in your last vision you saw a bomb going off on the border.' Yes, I did. Kim Jong-un was trying to be buddy-buddy with China and Russia. They were trying to bring South Korea into the pact by influencing their government and taking Taiwan back, making a stronger front for China because they're desperate. People say, 'You said you saw Kim Jong-un be removed. What happened with that?' I believe God is going to give an opportunity for the North Korean people to find him, so they don't all go to hell because they never heard the gospel. I believe God is just and he will bring justice to the injustice, and he will expose and remove Kim Jong-un one day. He will do the same with his sister. Just like he did with Pharaoh, he will lead his people out of bondage again and give them a time to hear what the Spirit of the Lord is saying. People may not agree, but I believe God is a God of mercy. We are running out of time and coming to the end of things. You ask, 'What did you think about the eclipse, Brandon?' I believe it's more than finances. I get caught up in what I say; I’m not the best speaker. I go over these videos many times in my mind beforehand because people are mean to me and I try hard to say the right things. As I said, I try with the words. Diana often says, 'You meant to say this, Brandon,' when she's sitting next to me. She doesn't want to interrupt my flow, but I’d rather she did because I say certain words while meaning something else. In my mind, it’s right, but it comes out differently. That’s when people say, 'Well, you said this,' and I realize I didn’t mean it that way. If you truly knew me, you'd know I try really hard. I'll say it again, and I hope my son helps me. I’ve told him, 'Please correct me if I mess up.' What I saw regarding the eclipse in April happened a year ago. That Tuesday, yesterday, was part of a window of opportunity for the shifting of finances. He said, 'Pay attention to Israel and Iran in the days ahead.' This is the part I left out. People say, 'You messed up on the six-month window.' I was talking about the period from November to April. That’s a six-month window. It’s at the end. The Lord said, 'I have been monitoring the hearts. I am watching to see how they drink and how they come unto me.' Regarding the river, the Lord told me, 'I'm watching the people who have lost themselves in me.' He said those who are not ashamed of how they drink or how they minister to those on the street corners—those who don't worry about being dignified or flowing a certain way, but are just lapping up the water because they want more of Jesus. From the election to where we are now, he’s looking at the heart of America. Have the people forgotten what he's already done? Have they let go of the rope? He said many have. There is a pride that has set in again. He said, 'They have had stiff necks towards me, Brandon. There will be a shaking to awaken, for America will be humbled. Through this, I will bring a great revival back to your shores.' How do you get people's attention? Through their pocketbooks. Money is America's god, along with the lust of the flesh. We have to get soul-driven. I know many of you watching are after souls and want people to come to Jesus. I'm excited you're here because that's what I'm after. People ask, 'Where's the revival, Brandon?' I don't know where the full manifestation is yet, but I know it will come out of pressure. He's given us a window. I’m believing in an 'all hands on deck' experience where people take this seriously and minister to those in Walmart or wherever they are. Not being Bible-beating, but just loving on people and showing the love of God. Let’s take communion and pray together. Ask the Father what you should do for your household. Don’t act out of fear—don't just rush to buy survival food or a well. Follow the voice of the Lord. The Lord said there will be great droughts where we live and that we'll need a well. I don’t have a well yet; I priced one and it’s a lot of money. But you believe God; that’s what you do. I don’t freak out. I say, 'God, I have a need, so I sow a seed and believe for my harvest.' Lord, you’ll provide a well if you want me to have one. I say, 'Lord, this is your bill, not mine.' If you want me to have a well, you’ll provide the well. If you want me to have a house in the woods, you'll provide it. I'm not going to freak out. You can easily start asking, 'What about this or that?' No. Peace. Peace. I ain't doing all that. I'll go find a creek and get a five-gallon bucket of water and boil it if I had to. You know what I'm saying? I mean, seriously, I'm an old country boy. I just go out and find an old pond. It may be dirty looking, red water up here in Oklahoma, but you go up there and get it with those LifeStraws and drink it out of there. I mean, seriously. There's plenty of little water patches around here. You just go out there and find a LifeStraw. I don't know, and maybe do something. I probably should study it before I say all that because I have no idea. I know LifeStraw is supposed to work, right? The commercial says it did. When I saw it before, they could be lying to me, though. I'd probably go there and say, 'You go out there and drink it,' and then your brain's like, 'Raise the dead. Get up, Dad.' No, that'd be terrible. These gimmicks—there's a lot of gimmicks online, so you have to really be careful with some of this stuff. But you know, it was really cool because this one sister reached out to us and showed us these Tower Gardens. That was one of the things we're doing. That's why I have to be real with that. A Tower Garden grows vegetables all year round and it keeps them fresh. You can grow tomatoes, lettuce, cucumbers, all kinds of stuff in there. And it just grows out of a little peat pod thing, and the lights shine on it, and it grows vegetables all year round. It's a Tower Garden and it's brilliant and it produces a lot of vegetables. So if we got two of them, it produces enough for you and maybe some extra as long as you keep it going. So what I'm trying to say to you is that there are ideas, because I thought, 'Man, how do you have all this?' Who wants to eat that MRE food all the time? What about some fresh vegetables? So, I'm always trying to think about things. How do you cook some of this stuff if things were really to go that bad? Because it's nasty and it ain't healthy. Some of this stuff's not healthy. So, you start thinking about all that stuff and I just go, 'Well, you know,' so in my mind wondering about things, I think about Tower Gardens. I don't know. There's a freebie. Father, we just come before you boldly and we put all our needs—all the stuff that we see on CNN, Fox, and MSNBC, and on this channel—I don't want to freak people out. All I want to do is call them to pray. That's all I'm doing is saying, 'Pray. Pray.' My job is to call people to prayer—a call to prayer, not a call to fear. I'm never going to bring you to fear. You say, 'Well, you're scaring me.' No. I want to call you to pray, not fear. My job is: 'Fear tolerated is faith contaminated.' Being in fear is not God. Perfect love casts out all fear. Period. And I believe in the power of this covenant and I believe that he'll take care of me. So, Father, I thank you, Lord, that you said you would. And regardless of where we are on this earth—there's so many in Africa, so many all around, and there's so many different beliefs on here—I believe, Father, that no matter who we are or what we believe, as long as we believe in Jesus, and that he died on the cross, and he rose again on the third day, and he's seated at the right hand of the Father, and I confessed him to be my Lord and Savior, and that you wrote my name in the Lamb's Book of Life. I was baptized in church. You'll take care of me. I believe that God has a hand on me and I take this body because you say take it often in remembrance of you, Lord. So I believe, Father, that you've got my life and you'll take care of us. And we take this body right now in the name of Jesus. Lord, you were wounded and you forgive us, Father. Forgive us of our sins. You said if we confess our sins, you are faithful and just to forgive us of our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. And I take this blood right now in the name of Jesus. And I lift up the cup of the covenant before you, Father. Forgive me, Father, of my sins. Wash me in your blood, Father. I've come short so many times, and every single time I don't run from you, I run to you. You know all that I need before I even need it. And Father, I thank you for the blood. And I apply the blood of Jesus over my life right now in Jesus' name. From the top of my head to the soles of my feet, I plead the blood of Jesus. Thank you, Lord. Thank you, Father. Lord, you're so good to us. Thank you, Father, for all that you've done and all that you're going to do. You're so good to us. And whatever you say to do, we do it. Just like Mary said, 'Whatever he tells you to do, do it.' We'll do it, Father. We will hear your voice and a stranger's voice we will not follow. We'll follow you, Father. And we're not going to be led by our emotions or by our flesh and be all stirred up about things. We're going to be filled by you and going to be controlled by you because God, we yield ourselves to you and you're a gentleman. And Father, we take captive our thoughts and we bring them under the obedience of the word. And Father, we plead the blood over our minds today and we say, 'Peace, sisters, peace. Peace. No fear. Perfect love casteth out all fear. We're not to be in fear. We're called to pray.' Father, I thank you, Lord, for this trade war that will cease. Father, I know some of this stuff has to take place for the end times. But it will not touch our medical supplies. Xi Jinping will not touch the medical supplies. He'll have morals concerning this or our medical anesthesia or anything that comes out of China that we depend on for medical or our supplies. Father, we call a de-escalation of this trade war in the name of Jesus. And we say this will not take place. We call peace to it and that there'll be fair trade with America and fair trade with China. Fair trade all around the world, Father. And that America, we're not bullies. They will not be bullies. But Father, we set standards that we're not taking advantage of either. Father, I thank you, Lord, that there's a change of things in Jesus' name. We call a change of things in Jesus' name. Father, we pray over our economy that things will turn around. Father, that we'll not have lines down the road for no food. That, Father, that we'll not have bank runs and people lining up taking all the money out like it was in 'It's a Wonderful Life.' Father, we'll not have that kind of stuff. Father, I thank you, Lord, that people will be peaceful and levelheaded when it comes to the markets and all this stuff. I know, Father, that you told me that we're stepping into the beast system soon and this is part of it. So, Father, I thank you, Lord, that as believers, we are believing believers that hear you and we know exactly what you want us to do before we're supposed to do it. We're going to hear you. We're going to know ahead of time. We're not going to be worried. We're not going to be caught off guard, Father. We'll be like Abraham sitting up there and going, 'Father, what's going to happen in the future? Tell us what's coming so that we're always in the right place at the right time doing exactly what you want us to do,' and we're not Lot sitting down there in Sodom and Gomorrah going, 'I wonder,' not even having a clue what's coming in 24 hours. I do not want to be Lot. Father, help me to be like Abraham that knows ahead of time what's coming. Thank you, Father. And that's what I pray. You pray that, too. Help me to be like Abraham, to be exactly where I need to be when I need to be there. Father, I plead the blood of Jesus over every single person that is represented here, over their marriage, over their children, over their households, and we plead the blood of Jesus over them in Jesus' name. Father, they have peace that passes all understanding. I thank you, Lord, that they're always in the right place at the right time. Father, I thank you, Lord, that they have a covenant with you.
